entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used to evaluate the plant growth-promoting effects of Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used to evaluate the plant growth-promoting effects of Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: AMYCOLATOPSIS SP.
entities.description: A plant growth-promoting actinomycete isolate, specifically BCA-696, that enhances growth and yield in chickpea and sorghum

entities.name: STREPTOMYCES SP.
entities.description: A genus of actinomycetes mentioned as a common source of plant growth-promoting bacteria

entities.name: ACTINOMYCETES
entities.description: A group of Gram-positive bacteria from which Amycolatopsis sp. was isolated

entities.name: PLANT GROWTH-PROMOTING
entities.description: The ability of a microorganism to enhance the growth, development, and yield of a plant

entities.name: INDOLE ACETIC ACID
entities.description: A plant growth hormone produced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: SIDEROPHORE
entities.description: An iron-chelating compound produced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: CELLULASE
entities.description: An enzyme that breaks down cellulose, produced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: LIPASE
entities.description: An enzyme that breaks down lipids, produced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: PROTEASE
entities.description: An enzyme that breaks down proteins, produced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: CHITINASE
entities.description: An enzyme that breaks down chitin, produced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: HYDROCYANIC ACID
entities.description: A compound produced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: BETA-1,3-GLUCANASE
entities.description: An enzyme that breaks down glucans, produced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: ROOT LENGTH
entities.description: A growth parameter enhanced in chickpea by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: ROOT VOLUME
entities.description: A growth parameter enhanced in chickpea by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: SHOOT WEIGHT
entities.description: A growth parameter enhanced in chickpea by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: ROOT WEIGHT
entities.description: A growth parameter enhanced in both chickpea and sorghum by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: NODULE NUMBER
entities.description: A growth parameter enhanced in chickpea by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: POD NUMBER
entities.description: A growth parameter enhanced in chickpea by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: SEED WEIGHT
entities.description: A growth parameter enhanced in chickpea by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: STOVER YIELD
entities.description: A yield parameter enhanced in both chickpea and sorghum by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: A yield parameter enhanced in both chickpea and sorghum by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: LEAF AREA
entities.description: A growth parameter enhanced in sorghum by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: STEM WEIGHT
entities.description: A growth parameter enhanced in sorghum by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: PLANT WEIGHT
entities.description: A growth parameter enhanced in sorghum by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: TOTAL N
entities.description: Total nitrogen content in the rhizosphere soil, enhanced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: AVAILABLE P
entities.description: Available phosphorus content in the rhizosphere soil, enhanced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: ORGANIC C
entities.description: Organic carbon percentage in the rhizosphere soil, enhanced by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: 16S RDNA ANALYSIS
entities.description: A molecular method used to identify Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: SCANNING ELECTRON MICROSCOPE ANALYSIS
entities.description: An imaging method used to observe the colonization of chickpea and sorghum roots by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: PH
entities.description: An environmental factor tolerated by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: An environmental factor tolerated by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: NACL CONCENTRATIONS
entities.description: An environmental factor tolerated by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: FUNGICIDES
entities.description: Chemical agents tolerated by Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696

entities.name: GREENHOUSE CONDITIONS
entities.description: Controlled environment used for testing the effects of Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696 on chickpea

entities.name: FIELD CONDITIONS
entities.description: Natural environment used for testing the effects of Amycolatopsis sp. BCA-696 on chickpea and sorghum
